summary: Completed issue 082 V5 runner hardening and merged it through PR 83. Issue 080 repository memory now reflects PR 81 merge and GitHub CI success, the runtime launch default budget is 2.00, execute-runtime-launch diagnostic previews normalize non-ASCII text before truncation, CLI tests cover default budget and fake Unicode stdout failure diagnostics, runtime docs are aligned, and local-only agent settings paths are ignored without committing their contents.
policy_result: Passed locally and through GitHub PR gates. Work stayed inside the issue 082 execution contract and scope manifest. PR 83 passed GitHub CI and was squash-merged into main as commit b47b396c4b277444f598292cc85e0183ce009eec. The task did not access protected credentials, touch production, install dependencies, change authentication, authorization, billing, database, CI/CD security, or deployment automation. Local-only .agents and .claude/settings.local.json remain uncommitted.
risk_result: Medium risk. The change modifies bounded runtime launch defaults and runtime failure diagnostics. The new default remains capped by existing MaxBudgetUsd validation of greater than 0 and no more than 10. Non-ASCII diagnostic previews are normalized only in bounded preview text; stdout and stderr lengths, line counts, hashes, execution status, and exit codes remain based on captured process output.
unresolved_risks: The next serious live pilot still needs to prove the hardened default in a real multi-slice Claude Code run without coordinator remediation.
merge_status: Merged through PR 83 with squash commit b47b396c4b277444f598292cc85e0183ce009eec after GitHub CI passed.
